samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Input signal representing the multiplicand with a data width of "size" bits.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Input signal representing the multiplier with a data width of "size" bits.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product output signal with a data width of 2*size bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="size" value="4"/> <!-- Define parameter 'size' with a value of 4 -->
    </parameter_description>
    
    <implementation>
        // Extending inputs with zeros
        wire [size-1:0] a_ext = {mul_a};
        wire [size-1:0] b_ext = {mul_b};
        
        // Generate partial products based on multiplier bits
        genvar i;
        generate
            for(i = 0; i < size; i = i + 1) begin : gen_partial_products
                wire [size-1:0] pp_i;
                
                if(b_ext[i]) begin
                    assign pp_i = a_ext << i; // Shift multiplicand by i positions if multiplier bit is 1
                end else begin
                    assign pp_i = 'd0; // Set partial product to 0 if multiplier bit is 0
                end
                
                // Register to hold the sum of partial products
                reg [2*size-1:0] r_sum_pp_i;
                always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
                    if(!rst_n) begin
                        r_sum_pp_i <= 0; // Reset register on active-low reset
                    end else begin
                        r_sum_pp_i <= r_sum_pp_i + pp_i; // Add current partial product to previous sum
                    end
                end
            end
        endgenerate
        
        // Final product calculation
        reg [2*size-1:0] r_mul_out;
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                r_mul_out <= 0; // Reset product output on active-low reset
            end else begin
                r_mul_out <= r_sum_pp_i; // Update product output with the last sum of partial products
            end
        end
        
        assign mul_out = r_mul_out; // Assign the final product output
    </implementation>
</module>
